title: Altered Immunocompetence | Vaccines & Immunizations | CDC
text:
Zoster vaccine is an exception and should be withheld 1 month following anti-B cell agents. After vaccination, anti-B cell agents can be resumed 1 month later.
(a) Patients who have not received a primary series and booster dose or at least 1 dose of Hib vaccine after 14 months of age are considered unimmunized.
